name: CTT PHARMACEUTICAL HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: PART I . Overview Mindesta Inc. ("Mindesta," "the Company," "our" or "we") is a Delaware Corporation, was incorporated on November 6, 1996 under the name Winchester Mining Corp. The name of the Company was changed to PNW Capital, Inc. on May 16, 2000. In 2002, PNW Capital, Inc. acquired Industrial Minerals Incorporated, a private Nevada Corporation, and changed its name to Industrial Minerals, Inc. Effective July 26, 2011, the Company adopted the new name of "Mindesta Inc.". In conjunction with ...
